title: pyrus aria var. majestica
intro: Pyrus aria var. majestica, also known as the mountain pear or silver buffaloberry, is a shrub plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Pyrus aria var. majestica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
